title: The Emperors Face the Worst Generation
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Sanji, Unknown person #6, Queen, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah, hot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yummm! These are so good!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The chewy noodles! Their silky texture!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The scent of buckwheat explosives with every bite!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: course they do, good sir! We of Haraguroya use n/--HACH! SOBA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Made from only the finest buckwheat flour wano country has to offer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: SOBA! SOBA!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Please, lovely ladies. Be my guest. :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh! Why thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: MMM! It's so good! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I always look forward to a bowl of these noodles come payday.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wow! Wouldja look at this crowd!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guess you won't be opening a SOBA restaurant round here!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Hm? Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well? How's today's haul?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Heh heh! Nice an plump, big bro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. It's real easy to tell who lives in the poorhouses by their clothes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They're easy marks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: course they are. No poor slob could understand the deliciousness of our noodles.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It takes a person of proper status and palate to appreciate them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Poor slobs with their dull tongues don't deserve those noodles.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll scarf down lesser ones with lower buckwheat content!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I figured as much.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! I getcha. If they peg a customer as poor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...they charge 'em full price but give 'em cheap noodles...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... then pocket the difference for them- selves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But how'd you figure that out?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The aroma.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
